bundle_cancer_screening/dist/medicaid_ca.long_name: Medicaid and CHIP Cancer Screening Rate
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/medicaid_ca.short_description: Percentage of Medicaid and CHIP beneficiaries who received cancer screening.
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/medicaid_ca.long_description: State-level cancer screening rates for Medicaid and CHIP beneficiaries, from the Medicaid and CHIP Adult Core Set Quality Measures voluntarily reported by states to CMS (2014–2023). Includes breast cancer screening (BCS: women aged 50–74 who received a mammogram), cervical cancer screening (CCS: women aged 21–64 who received appropriate cervical cancer screening), and colorectal cancer screening (COL: adults aged 50–75 who received appropriate colorectal cancer screening). Reporting is voluntary; not all states report all measures each year.

bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Cancer Screening and Prevention Utilization Rate by State and Age
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.short_description: Percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who received cancer screening, by state and age group.
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.long_description: State-level cancer screening utilization rates for Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool. Includes mammogram (breast cancer screening), pap test (cervical cancer screening), colorectal cancer screening, and prostate cancer screening. Rates reflect the percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who utilized each preventive screening service. Stratified by age group.

bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.short_name: Medicare FFS cancer screening rate by sex
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Cancer Screening Utilization Rate by Sex
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.short_description: Percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who received cancer screening, stratified by sex.
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.long_description: State-level cancer screening utilization rates for Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool, stratified by sex. Includes mammogram, pap test, colorectal cancer screening, and prostate cancer screening.

bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.short_name: Medicare FFS cancer screening rate by race/ethnicity
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Cancer Screening Utilization Rate by Race and Ethnicity
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.short_description: Percentage of Medicare FFS beneficiaries who received cancer screening, stratified by race and ethnicity.
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/cms_cancer_.long_description: State-level cancer screening utilization rates for Medicare Fee-for-Service beneficiaries from the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool, stratified by race and ethnicity. Includes mammogram, pap test, colorectal cancer screening, and prostate cancer screening.

bundle_cancer_screening/dist/combined_ca.long_name: Medicare Fee-for-Service Cancer Screening Rate (Combined Reference File)
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/combined_ca.short_description: Medicare FFS cancer screening rate in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file.
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/combined_ca.long_description: Medicare Fee-for-Service cancer screening utilization rate at the state level, included in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file. Filtered to Total age group. Excludes prostate cancer screening. From the CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities (MMD) by Population Tool.

bundle_cancer_screening/dist/combined_ca.long_name: Medicaid and CHIP Cancer Screening Rate (Combined Reference File)
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/combined_ca.short_description: Medicaid cancer screening rate in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file.
bundle_cancer_screening/dist/combined_ca.long_description: Medicaid and CHIP cancer screening rate at the state level, included in the combined Medicare and Medicaid reference file. Averaged across reporting programs where multiple values exist per state and year. From the Medicaid and CHIP Adult Core Set Quality Measures (2014–2023).
